_meta.note: English is the default field language (design §10). Keys are versioned; mandatory safety/referral strings are deterministic and human-reviewed (never model-generated). Final paired EN/ID copy is owned by UX-1.

prototype.banner: Jaga is a research prototype. It does not diagnose or rule out TB.

footer.disclaimer: Jaga is an investigational research prototype. It does not diagnose or rule out tuberculosis. Every participant should receive confirmatory evaluation.

gate.title: Before you begin...
gate.lead: For symptomatic adults aged 18 and over. This tool prioritizes follow-up urgency and does not decide whether a person receives testing.

acknowledgements.adultWithCough: I confirm this case is an adult aged 18 or over with cough symptoms.
acknowledgements.confirmatoryEvaluation: I understand confirmatory TB evaluation is required regardless of any estimate.

gate.uploadCxr: Upload a digital CXR for Prisma

estimateMeaning.cough: A calibrated model estimate of how compatible this recording is with TB. Not a diagnosis, and not a personal probability of having TB.

result.howToRead: Relative model-estimated risk, not a personal chance of having TB.
result.nextStep: This person should receive confirmatory TB evaluation regardless of this estimate.

body.cough: This estimate comes from a cough-audio model. It compares acoustic patterns in the recording against the reference cohort shown here. It cannot diagnose TB or replace confirmatory testing.
body.cxr: This estimate comes from a chest X-ray model. It compares imaging patterns in the uploaded X-ray against the reference cohort shown here. It cannot diagnose TB or replace confirmatory testing.

empty.title: No Gema result in this session
empty.description: Submit the clinical inputs and a cough recording first.

coughFocus.unavailable: Waveform preview unavailable for this recording.
coughFocus.caption: Illustrative recording summary, not model output.

review.title: Review and submit
review.clinicalIncompleteBody: Return to the form before submitting.

error.modelUnavailableTitle: Gema analysis is not available yet
error.modelUnavailableBody: The cough triage model is still being prepared, so no result can be produced yet. Your recordings are kept. Continue with the standard clinical pathway.
error.submitFailedBody: The recordings are still available. Try again.

noCough.title: No cough detected in the recording
noCough.body: The model did not find a cough in this recording, so no estimate was made. Record a clear, deliberate cough in a quiet place and submit again.

clinical.title: Clinical information
clinical.lead: Only fields supported by the approved model contract are collected.
clinical.nightSweatsLast30Days: Night sweats in the last 30 days
clinical.weightLossLast30Days: Weight loss in the last 30 days
clinical.validateFailedBody: Check your connection and try again.
clinical.incompleteHint: Complete all required fields to continue.

coughs.title: Record your cough

bullets.duration: Record for up to *1 minute 30 seconds*.
bullets.natural: Cough *naturally, several times* while it records.
bullets.finish: Stop when you're done, or let the recording *finish on its own*.
bullets.retry: Recording again *discards this take* and starts over from zero.

status.denied: Microphone blocked. Enable it in your browser settings, then try again.
status.error: Could not start recording. Try again.

coughs.detectedNote: Cough detection runs on-device and is illustrative, not a clinical measurement.

captured.tooShort: That recording was too short. Record again so there's enough to analyze.

chat.title: Guidance assistant
chat.disclaimer: Workflow help only. Not diagnosis or result interpretation
chat.empty: Ask about the current screen, form fields, recording steps, or what happens next.

error.unavailable: Guidance is temporarily unavailable. Continue with the standard workflow.

launcher.title: Jaga guidance
launcher.privacy: Workflow help only. Do not enter names or personal medical details.

cxr.title: Upload a chest X-ray
cxr.lead: Prisma accepts one digital chest X-ray export. It produces a separate research estimate and is not combined with the cough result.
cxr.imageHint: PNG or JPEG, up to 10 MiB.
cxr.confirmLabel: I confirm this is a digital CXR export, not a photo of a screen or film.

errors.unsupportedMedia: Choose a PNG or JPEG image.
errors.payloadTooLarge: The image must be no larger than {maxMiB} MiB.
errors.invalidSource: The image could not be decoded. Choose a valid digital CXR export.
errors.missingSelection: Select and confirm a digital CXR export.

error.modelUnavailableTitle: Prisma analysis is not available yet
error.modelUnavailableBody: The chest X-ray model is still being prepared, so no result can be produced yet. Your image is kept — continue with the standard clinical pathway.
error.submitFailedBody: The selected image remains available. Try again.

empty.title: No Prisma result in this session
empty.description: Upload a digital CXR image first.

result.estimateMeaning: A calibrated model estimate of how compatible this image is with TB. Not a diagnosis, and not a personal probability of having TB.
result.figureCaption: Uploaded chest X-ray and optional model heatmap. Shown for inspection; not a clinical explanation.
result.gradcamUnavailable: Model heatmap unavailable in this prototype

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: This page does not exist in the capture flow.
